Network & Diagnostics

Test API requests, console output, and network conditions.

GET /api/data (normal)
GET /api/data
GET /api/data?delay=3000 (slow 3s)
GET /api/data?delay=3000
GET /api/data/error (500)
GET /api/data/error
POST /api/data (JSON body)
POST /api/data
GET /api/auth/me (auth check)
